examples: They hypothesize that language diversity must be about history, cultural differences, mountains or oceans dividing populations.
Some scientists hypothesize that the extinction of the dinosaurs resulted from the effects of an asteroid collision with Earth.
But others hypothesize that a new supercontinent will form in a different way.
We hypothesize that the plaque leads to inflammation that injures brain cells, and ultimately leads to cell death and dementia.
Proga and his colleagues hypothesize that intense ultraviolet light emanating from the accretion disk region produces two types of winds.
